title: Her Man o' War
writer: Frederick J. Jackson, Charles Logue, Jeanie Macpherson
actors: Jetta Goudal, William Boyd, Jimmie Adams
plot: During World War I, an American soldier is captured and taken prisoner by the Germans. However, instead of being placed in a prisoner-of-war camp, he is assigned to the small farm of a young woman and her son to help raise crops t...
